scan_metadata.findings_summary: dperkis@lahzo.com is a clean work-only inbox. No Atlanta personal event/activity emails found. The inbox contains Lahzo work calendar invites, meeting notes, and Google Workspace notifications only. The personal Google calendar (PERSONAL) was just shared into this account on 2026-04-20 — no historical personal event emails have forwarded through. One ATL-adjacent email found: Industrious coworking onboarding at Perimeter (7000 Central Parkway). Recommend scanning dperkis@gmail.com (personal) for richer ATL event history.

recommendation: The work email yielded no usable ATL event/activity data. To populate evergreen activity content from personal email history, scan dperkis@gmail.com using the GWS CLI: `gws gmail search --query 'Atlanta event OR festival OR museum OR aquarium' --limit 50`. That account is expected to have Eventbrite confirmations, venue booking receipts, and family activity emails.
